hero.headline: The first puzzle subscription library in Romania
hero.subheadline: Get access to new puzzles every month without buying and storing them.

problem.title: Puzzle joy should not turn into storage clutter.

cards.title: Most puzzles are assembled only once

steps.title: Choose a puzzle
steps.text: Pick your next puzzle from the collection.

steps.title: Assemble it
steps.text: Enjoy the process on your own or with family.

steps.title: Return or exchange it
steps.text: Send it back when you are done.

benefits.title: Built for puzzle lovers who want more variety.

items.title: Save money
items.text: Try more puzzles without repeated purchases.

items.title: Save space
items.text: Avoid keeping boxes on shelves for years.

items.title: Discover new puzzles
items.text: Explore varied collections for different styles and levels.

items.title: Community driven
items.text: The service grows around member preferences.

items.title: Flexible subscription
items.text: The final model will be shaped with early users.

items.title: Large collection
items.text: Planned across themes, sizes, and difficulty levels.

survey.title: Help validate the idea in 30 seconds.
survey.frequency: How often do you assemble puzzles?
survey.owned: How many puzzles do you currently own?
survey.interest: Would you use a puzzle subscription?
survey.success: Thank you, your answers were recorded.
survey.error: We could not save your answers. Please try again.

waitlist.title: Be among the first to test PuzzleFlow.
waitlist.success: You are on the waitlist. We will email you when the test launches.
waitlist.duplicate: This email is already on the waitlist.
waitlist.error: We could not save your signup. Please try again.

items.question: What is PuzzleFlow?
items.answer: PuzzleFlow is a puzzle subscription library concept for Romania.

items.question: How much will it cost?
items.answer: Final pricing will be set after validating demand and user preferences.

items.question: When will it launch?
items.answer: The plan is to start with a limited test after enough people join the waitlist.

items.question: Can I exchange my own puzzles?
items.answer: We are considering a community component, including exchanges, if there is interest.
